name: Summer Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
2. Shred the carrots, peeled apples.
3. Add pineapple, lemon zest, carrots, and apples to the yogurt.
4. Mix well.
5. Serve immediately. To save for later, refrigerate the lettuce separately in a tightly sealed bowl and add the yogurt mixture just before serving.
(Note: You can substitute plain yogurt for vanilla-flavored yogurt by adding 1 tsp of vanilla extract and your preferred sweetener.)
